error.signature: RuntimeError: cuDNN error: CUDNN_STATUS_EXECUTION_FAILED when calling cudnnRNNBackwardData

verdict.summary: cuDNN RNN backward pass fails. Often caused by non-contiguous hidden states, wrong CUDA/cuDNN version, or variable-length sequences without packing.

dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling cuDNN massively slows down RNN operations (10-50x slower); fix the root cause instead

dead_ends.action: Downgrade to a much older PyTorch version
dead_ends.why_fails: Older versions have different cuDNN bugs; the real fix is proper input handling

workarounds.action: Make hidden states contiguous before passing to RNN
workarounds.how: hidden = hidden.contiguous()  # or h_0, c_0 = h_0.contiguous(), c_0.contiguous()

workarounds.action: Set torch.backends.cudnn.deterministic=True as a diagnostic step
workarounds.how: If deterministic mode works, the issue is a cuDNN non-deterministic kernel bug; update CUDA/cuDNN
